allow:
Bash(BASE="E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src"
mkdir -p "$BASE/components/atoms/icons"
mkdir -p "$BASE/assets/svg/general"
mkdir -p "$BASE/mocks"
mkdir -p "$BASE/components/organisms/sidebar"
mkdir -p "$BASE/pages/dashboard"
mkdir -p "$BASE/pages/inbox"
mkdir -p "$BASE/pages/login"
mkdir -p "$BASE/pages/settings"
mkdir -p "$BASE/types"
echo "Directories created")

Bash(BASE="E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/AuthorityIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/AuthorityIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/InboxIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/InboxIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/IncomingIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/IncomingIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/LeftChevronIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/LeftChevronIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/MagnifyingGlassIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/MagnifyingGlassIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/OutgoingIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/OutgoingIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/SettingIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/SettingIcon.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/icons/SuitcaseIcon.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/icons/SuitcaseIcon.tsx"
echo "Icons copied")

Bash(BASE="E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src/assets/svg"
for f in dashboard.svg inbox.svg inbox-page.svg left-chevron.svg logo.svg logout.svg pending.svg profile.svg rejected.svg right-chevron.svg search.svg setting.svg shield.svg suitcase.svg completed.svg; do
  cp "$BASE/$f" "$BASE/general/$f"
done
echo "SVGs copied")

Bash(BASE="E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src"
cp "$BASE/components/ui/field.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/field.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/ui/input.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/input.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/ui/label.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/label.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/ui/separator.tsx" "$BASE/components/atoms/separator.tsx"
echo "UI files copied to atoms/")

Bash(BASE="E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src"
cp "$BASE/components/pages/dashboard/index.tsx" "$BASE/pages/dashboard/index.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/pages/inbox/index.tsx" "$BASE/pages/inbox/index.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/pages/login/index.tsx" "$BASE/pages/login/index.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/pages/settings/index.tsx" "$BASE/pages/settings/index.tsx"
cp "$BASE/components/pages/settings/settingsMainPage.tsx" "$BASE/pages/settings/settingsMainPage.tsx"
echo "Pages copied")

Bash(find "E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src/components/molecules" -type f | sort
echo "---"
find "E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src/components/pages" -type f | sort 2>/dev/null || echo "no pages"
echo "---"
find "E:/engineering/minstery of defense/src" -name "sidebarRoutes*" -o -name "pages.ts" 2>/dev/null | sort)
